Module org.kink_lang.kink

Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir

package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile
    Compiles itree to FunVal by runtime bytecode generation.
    org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.bootstrap
    Bootstrap methods.
    org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.classgen
    Generates compiled classes.
    org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.tempval
    Temporary vals used by generated code.
  • Class
    Description
    Allocation
    Where the local var is stored?
    Allocation.Arg
    The local var is an arg of the fun call.
    Allocation.Field
    The local var is placed on the field of the compiled fun class.
    Allocation.Preloaded
    It is a preloaded fun.
    Allocation.Recv
    The local var is the recv of the fun call.
    Allocation.Stack
    The local var is placed on the data stack.
    Allocation.Unused
    It is not used / not stored.
    AllocationSet
    Allocation analysis of localvars in a fast fun.
    BindingCaptureFastFunCompiler
    Compiles binding-capture fast funs.
    BindingGenerator
    Generates insns of \binding.
    BytecodeGenState
    State of generation of bytecode.
    ChildJcirAccumulator
    Accumulates child JavaClassIr instances.
    CompilerSupport
    Provides support methods for compilation.
    ControlGenerator
    Generates insns of controls.
    FastLvarAccessGenerator
    Generates insns of loval vars in a ssa fun.
    InFastFunLetRecGenerator
    Generates letrec within fast fun.
    InSlowFunLetRecGenerator
    Generates letrec within slow fun.
    Insn
    Thin wrapping records of GeneratorAdapter methods.

    add-int insn.
    Insn.ArrayStore
    Array-store insn.
    Insn.Case
    Marks the case label for the table-switch.

    Insn.Default
    Marks the default label for the table-switch.

    Dup insn.

    If-gt insn for int.
    Insn.IfLtInt
    If-lt insn for int.

    If-nonnull insn.
    Insn.IfNonZero
    If-nonzero insn.

    Insn.NewInstance

    push-int insn.
    Insn.PushString
    push-string or null insn.

    Generates insns of doResume.
    JavaClassIr
    The IR of the generated fun in the precursor form of a Java class.
    JcirFactory
    Factory of JavaClassIr, stored in childJcirFactories field of generated fun classes.
    KeyStrSupplier
    Generates unique key strings.
    LetRecGenerator
    Generates letrec.
    LvarAccessGenerator
    Generates insns to access local vars.

    Generator of insns of making binding-capture fast fun.

    Makes insns to make SSA funs.

    Generates insns of making val-capturing fast fun.

    Common parts of new_val.
    OverriddenControlGenerator
    Generates insns for controls for the case when intrinsic implementations cannot be used.
    ProgramCounterSupplier
    Supplies program counters.
    SlowFunCompiler
    Compiler of slow funs.
    SlowLvarAccessGenerator
    Generates access to local vars of slow funs.

    Compiles top level funs.
    TraceAccumulator
    Accumulates trace for compilation.
    UnchangedControlGenerator
    Generator of intrinsic implementation of control.
    ValCaptureFastFunCompiler
    Compiles val-capture fast funs.
